name: nyra-browser
description: Nyra is a minimal, personal web browser built with Electron.   Fast, distraction-free, privacy-first — and fully yours.

scripts.lint: node --check main.js && node --check preload.js && node --check src/storage.js && node --check src/url-utils.js && node --check src/renderer.js && node --check test/url-utils.test.js && node --check test/storage.test.js
